Mental Health Is Health

Let's talk about it!

Find Resources

Learn About

Our Why

We are kicking the stigma around mental health through the inspiring power of sports.

In 2020, the Jim Irsay family and Indianapolis Colts made a promise to help tackle the mental health crisis in Indiana. Right now, thousands of Hoosiers are struggling with their mental health. But together, we can change the narrative and remove the stigma around asking for help.

Million

People Are Living with a Mental Health Condition

Percent

of People Don't Get the Mental Health Services They Need

Million

Americans Will Experience a Mental Illness This Year Alone

615

Million

People Are Living with a Mental Health Condition

60

Percent

of People Don't Get the Mental Health Services They Need

65

Million

Americans Will Experience a Mental Illness This Year Alone

Impact

Learn More About Our Work

Help Us Start The

Conversation

"Seems like something's up. Do you wanna talk about what's going on?"

"How can I support you when you're feeling down?"

"You look a little stressed. What's worrying you?"

"I know you've been dealing with a lot lately. How are you holding up?"

"What's something you're looking forward to right now?"
